info.title: CluedIn REST API — Search
info.description: Query the CluedIn graph and manage saved searches.

get.description: Returns paged saved searches matching the supplied filter model. Returns 400 with validation details when the filter model is invalid.

post.description: Creates a new saved search from the supplied model. Returns 201 Created with a `Location` header pointing at the new resource. Returns 400 when the filter rule fails validation.

get.description: Returns paged saved searches matching the supplied filter model. Returns 400 with validation details when the filter model is invalid.

post.description: Creates a new saved search from the supplied model. Returns 201 Created with a `Location` header pointing at the new resource. Returns 400 when the filter rule fails validation.

get.description: Returns a single saved search by id. Returns 404 if the saved search cannot be found.

post.description: Updates a saved search. Returns 403 if the caller does not have access to update it, 404 if it cannot be found, and 400 when the filter rule fails validation.

delete.description: Deletes a saved search. Returns 403 if the caller does not have access to delete it and 404 if it cannot be found.

get.description: Returns a single saved search by id. Returns 404 if the saved search cannot be found.

post.description: Updates a saved search. Returns 403 if the caller does not have access to update it, 404 if it cannot be found, and 400 when the filter rule fails validation.

delete.description: Deletes a saved search. Returns 403 if the caller does not have access to delete it and 404 if it cannot be found.

get.description: Returns the caller's favorite saved searches, paged.

post.description: Adds a saved search to the caller's favorites. Returns 201 Created with a link to the favorites list and 404 when the saved search id cannot be found.

get.description: Returns the caller's favorite saved searches, paged.

post.description: Adds a saved search to the caller's favorites. Returns 201 Created with a link to the favorites list and 404 when the saved search id cannot be found.

delete.description: Removes a favorite by id. Returns 404 if the favorite cannot be found.
Removes a favorite by id. Returns 404 if the favorite cannot be found.

get.description: Returns auto-suggest completions for a query prefix. Dispatches to V1, V2, or V3 implementation based on the `Search.V3.Enabled` / `Search.V3.AutoSuggestEnabled` / `Search.V2.Enabled` configuration flags. Returns an empty list when the query is empty.
Version 2 of the auto-suggest endpoint, used when `Search.V2.Enabled` is true and V3 is not.
Version 3 of the auto-suggest endpoint, used when `Search.V3.Enabled` or `Search.V3.AutoSuggestEnabled` is true.

parameters.name: includeExternalData
parameters.description: Include externally-sourced entities. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: includeUnstructuredData
parameters.description: Include unstructured entities. Defaults to false.

get.description: Free-text search across the CluedIn graph. The controller dispatches to the V1, V2, or V3 implementation depending on the `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` / `Feature.Search.V2.Enabled` flags. Multiple overloads accept additional combinations of `type`, `dateSort`, `nameSort`, `direction`, `includePreviousFacets`, and `searchUnTokenized` — the spec exposes a single endpoint and the controller resolves the actual signature by `ExactQueryParam` matching. Response is cached for 120 seconds.

parameters.name: includeExternalData
parameters.description: Include externally-sourced entities. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: includeUnstructuredData
parameters.description: Include unstructured entities. Defaults to false.

get.description: Free-text search across the CluedIn graph. The controller dispatches to the V1, V2, or V3 implementation depending on the `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` / `Feature.Search.V2.Enabled` flags. Multiple overloads accept additional combinations of `type`, `dateSort`, `nameSort`, `direction`, `includePreviousFacets`, and `searchUnTokenized` — the spec exposes a single endpoint and the controller resolves the actual signature by `ExactQueryParam` matching. Response is cached for 120 seconds.

Returns a paged sub-search scoped to a single root entity, optionally filtered by entity type, with date-sort options. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.

Returns a paged sub-search scoped to a single root entity, optionally filtered by entity type, with date-sort options. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.

Returns a paged entity sub-search together with dynamically computed vocabulary-key facets, for use in the entity-detail facet panel. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.

Returns a paged entity sub-search together with dynamically computed vocabulary-key facets, for use in the entity-detail facet panel. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.
Version 2 of the entity sub-search. Same parameters as `/api/v1/entitysearch`.
Version 2 of the dynamic-facets endpoint.
Version 3 of the entity sub-search. Same parameters as `/api/v1/entitysearch`.
Version 3 of the dynamic-facets endpoint.

get.summary: Get entity from search store by id
get.description: Returns the entity record stored in the search index (Elasticsearch) for the supplied id. Returns 400 for invalid GUIDs.

get.summary: Get entity from search store by id
get.description: Returns the entity record stored in the search index (Elasticsearch) for the supplied id. Returns 400 for invalid GUIDs.

Joined search that lets a query span related entities; results are still entity instances but ranking includes edges of related types. Available only as `/api/joinsearch` and `/api/v2/joinsearch`. Dispatches to V2 or V3 implementation when feature flags are enabled. Returns an empty response when neither V2 nor V3 is enabled.
Version 3 of the joined search endpoint, used when `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` is true.

Returns auto-suggest completions for a query prefix. Dispatches to V1, V2, or V3 implementation based on the `Search.V3.Enabled` / `Search.V3.AutoSuggestEnabled` / `Search.V2.Enabled` configuration flags. Returns an empty list when the query is empty.

Returns entities that the search index considers similar to the supplied entity, augmented with suggested searches per hit. With the `type` parameter the similarity is restricted to one or more entity types (comma-separated). Returns 400 for invalid GUIDs.

Returns entities that the search index considers similar to the supplied entity, augmented with suggested searches per hit. With the `type` parameter the similarity is restricted to one or more entity types (comma-separated). Returns 400 for invalid GUIDs.
Runs a free-text search restricted to entities related to (a sub-graph of) the supplied parent entity id. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.
Runs a free-text search restricted to entities related to (a sub-graph of) the supplied parent entity id. Dispatches between V2 and V3 implementations based on `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled`.
Version 2 of the sub-search endpoint. Same parameters as `/api/v1/subsearch`.
Version 3 of the sub-search endpoint. Same parameters as `/api/v1/subsearch`.

get.summary: Get term aggregations for a property

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Entity identifier (when running on a single record).

get.description: Returns a term aggregation for a vocabulary key (property name) — the list of distinct values seen across the index and their counts. With only `id` the aggregation is run on the entity record id; with `propertyName` it targets a vocabulary key. Supports `resolveMappedKeys` to follow mapping chains. Returns 404 if the property cannot be resolved.

get.summary: Get term aggregations for a property

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Entity identifier (when running on a single record).

get.description: Returns a term aggregation for a vocabulary key (property name) — the list of distinct values seen across the index and their counts. With only `id` the aggregation is run on the entity record id; with `propertyName` it targets a vocabulary key. Supports `resolveMappedKeys` to follow mapping chains. Returns 404 if the property cannot be resolved.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque paging cursor for the next page.

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: Optional substring search inside bucket names.

parameters.name: resolveMappedKeys
parameters.description: When true, resolve to the destination mapped key. Defaults to false.

get.description: Returns paged term aggregations for a vocabulary key with optional text search inside the bucket names. Returns 404 if the property cannot be resolved and 400 when the cursor cannot be parsed.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque paging cursor for the next page.

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: Optional substring search inside bucket names.

parameters.name: resolveMappedKeys
parameters.description: When true, resolve to the destination mapped key. Defaults to false.

get.description: Returns paged term aggregations for a vocabulary key with optional text search inside the bucket names. Returns 404 if the property cannot be resolved and 400 when the cursor cannot be parsed.

get.summary: Get facet aggregations for a field

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of buckets. Defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: resolveMappedKeys
parameters.description: When true, follow mapping chains when running the aggregation.

get.description: Returns Elasticsearch term aggregations for a single schema field, taking the field's `DataType` into account (IP addresses get an additional `IpRange` aggregation). Returns 404 if the field is not in the entity schema.

get.summary: Get facet aggregations for a field

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of buckets. Defaults to 1000.

parameters.name: resolveMappedKeys
parameters.description: When true, follow mapping chains when running the aggregation.

get.description: Returns Elasticsearch term aggregations for a single schema field, taking the field's `DataType` into account (IP addresses get an additional `IpRange` aggregation). Returns 404 if the field is not in the entity schema.

Version 2 of the entity search endpoint. Reached either explicitly via `/api/v2/search` or implicitly when `Feature.Search.V2.Enabled` is true and V3 is not. Same query parameters as `/api/v1/search`.
Version 3 of the entity search endpoint. Reached either explicitly via `/api/v3/search` or implicitly when `Feature.Search.V3.Enabled` is true. Adds the `searchUnTokenized` option and richer ranking.
